name: SKY130 Bandpass Filter v2
description: Same passband (0.5-150 Hz) but sigma-delta oversampling relaxes the anti-alias requirements. Focus on low noise and clean passband.
margin_rule: Every spec must pass with >= 25% margin

f_high_hz.description: Upper -3 dB cutoff (relaxed upper bound — sigma-delta does anti-alias)

passband_ripple_db.description: Tighter ripple for clinical ECG morphology (was <1 dB)

stopband_atten_250hz_db.description: Relaxed from v1 (>20) — sigma-delta oversampling helps

output_noise_uvrms.description: Output noise in passband (referred to filter output, not input)

power_uw.description: Relaxed from v1 (<10) for better noise
